titleStmt.title: SII 39.229: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 229. (A.R. No. 229 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE MĀṞAVARMAN TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ VIKRAMA PĀṆḌYA DĒVA-7TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of poṉ 450 collected as taxes from the four villages in Rājēndrachōḻapurappaṟṟu, for conducting the festivals and offerings on the occasion of Rājakkanāyaṉ sandi, instituted in the name of the king in the temple of Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirumuṭṭam by Moṇṇaippirāṉ Sīrāmadēvar alias Sēdirāyaṉ, a native of KaruvūrPoṉpaṟṟi in Naḍuvilkūṟṟu a sub-division of Miḻalai kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam. Signatory Kappalūruḍaiyāṉ of Ulagaḷandaṇ-Chōḻanallūr in Miḻalaikūṟṟam of Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam is mentioned in it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ śrīmakittimel ko
māṟapaṉmar tribhuvaṉa ccakravattikaḷ
koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ
śrī vikramapāṇḍyadevaṟkku yāṇ
ṭu 7vatu tirumuṭṭattu Uṭaiyār ti
ru muṭṭamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉat
tārkku Iṉnayiṉārkku pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻa
laik kūṟṟattu naṭuvilar kūṟṟu karuvūr poṉpaṟṟi Uṭaiyāṉ
poṇṇaippirāṉ cirāmatevarāṉa cetarāyar namakku co
lla namperāl kaṭṭiṉa rācakkaḷuyaṉ cantikkum ti
runāḷukkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu
nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Irācentiracoḻa purapaṟṟil U
ḷḷūr nāyaṉmār paḻantevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nikki
Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa Āntaikuṭi poṉ Irunūṟṟu Eṇ
patum mociṭṭai poṉ Eḻupatum neṉmali Uṭaiya
paṟṟu vaḷḷamaṅkalam veṭṭuva meṟkkuṭi poṉ
Eṉpattāṟum kaṇavati kuṟucciyil poṉ patiṉāl Āka
p poṉ nāṉūṟṟu Aimpatukkum Ivvūrkaḷ Ēḻāvatu muta
mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākattantom Ivvūrkaḷ I
ṉṉāḷ mutal kaikkoṇṭu kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvum
kamuku koḻuntum ceṅkaḻunīrum Uḷḷiṭṭu tāṉ
veṇṭum payirceytu koṇṭu Ivvūrkaḷil Iṟukkum
poṉvari viṉivokam kācu vaṟkam kāttikaippaccai kāt
tikaip poṉvari Aricikāṇam kūṟṟilakkai kaṭaik kūṭṭilakkai
paṭi vālpeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu san=tivikrahappeṟu ce
kkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam veṭṭippāṭṭam Iṭai Ut
tivai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippaṉti nallerutu naṟpacu Iruntu parimā
la mañcāṭi makaṇmai kuḷavaṭai māvaṭai Ūrkaṇakkappeṟu ci kāriyap peṟum maṟṟu
m Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum tevaikaḷum Ināḷ mutal mutaliṟ tavirntu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku
pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Ūraṭaṅkalkaḷum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭi
kku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Ivvūrkaḷ nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūla stā
bhaṉamum paṇṇi sandrātittavaṟ cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu I
ṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittup potuka Ivai kappalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu pāṇṭi maṇṭa
lattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu kiḻkkūṟṟuppākkamāṉa Ulakaḷanta coḻanallūrk kappalūruṭai
yāṉ Aṉanta nārāyaṇaṉāṉa Ivai vāṇādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 7 vatu nāḷ 100 10 3 ...
Digital edition of SII 39.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
